quoteFirst: ‘I communicated at once with Minister of War,’ telegraphed Sir F.   Villiers, October 3,
quoteLast: ‘He summoned a meeting of Ministers,   who, after deliberation, informed me that, awaiting arrival of First   Lord they had decided to postpone departure. Audience with King for   Mr. Churchill will be arranged for at as early an hour as possible.’
